table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets) as sumpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpackets) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname vnet_name "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename vnet_name as "Virtual Network" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20467` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" | eventstats sum(bytes) as sum_by_exp by nfo_hostname exp_ip | search $advanced_filter$ | search src_port="$src_port$" (src_ip="$src_vm$" OR src_vm_name="$src_vm$") (dest_ip="$dest_vm$" OR dest_vm_name="$dest_vm$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport src_vm_name dest_vm_name | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval vnet_name=case((direction == "inbound"),dest_vnet_name,(direction == "outbound"),src_vnet_name) | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sum_bytes_out sum(packets) as sum_packets sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(packets_out) as sum_packets_out sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp _time | `format_ip_column(src_ip,src_ip,src_vm_name)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip,dest_ip,dest_vm_name)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets) as sumpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpackets) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname vnet_name "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename vnet_name as "Virtual Network" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Azure Traffic for Virtual Network "$submitted:VNET$" reported by NFO "$NFO$"

search.query: | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" vnet_name="$VNET$" | `format_ip_column(src_ip,src_ip,src_vm_name)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip,dest_ip,dest_vm_name)` | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytesin sum(sum_bytes_out) as sumbytesout sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_packets_out) as sumpacketsout sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port _time `nsg_traffic_by_host_pairs_table($span_int$,$range$)`

table.title: Azure Traffic for Virtual Network "$submitted:VNET$" reported by NFO "$NFO$"

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20467` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" | eventstats sum(bytes) as sum_by_exp by nfo_hostname exp_ip | search $advanced_filter$ | search src_port="$src_port$" (src_ip="$src_vm$" OR src_vm_name="$src_vm$") (dest_ip="$dest_vm$" OR dest_vm_name="$dest_vm$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport src_vm_name dest_vm_name | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval vnet_name=case((direction == "inbound"),dest_vnet_name,(direction == "outbound"),src_vnet_name) | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sum_bytes_out sum(packets) as sum_packets sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(packets_out) as sum_packets_out sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name src_ip src_port src_vm_name dest_ip dest_port dest_vm_name direction transport sum_by_exp _time | search vnet_name="$VNET$" | `format_ip_column(src_ip,src_ip,src_vm_name)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip,dest_ip,dest_vm_name)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytesin sum(sum_bytes_out) as sumbytesout sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_packets_out) as sumpacketsout sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip vnet_name sum_by_exp src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port _time `nsg_traffic_by_host_pairs_table($span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10467: Azure NSG Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20467). This Module identifies Azure VMs with the most traffic. It consolidates NSG Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “Azure NSG Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
